title: INF-3 Activation Steering / RepE: activation capture API + vector application
goal: Lift the per-adapter SteeringHookOps (CandleRuntime only; LlamaCpp returns CapabilityNotSupported) to the public Activation Steering / RepE technique surface per AC-INFER-LAB-8-TECHNIQUES.c. Reference: Zou et al. 2023 arXiv:2310.01405 (Representation Engineering: A Top-Down Approach to AI Transparency).
expected_diff_shape: New src/backend/handshake_core/src/model_runtime/techniques/activation_steering.rs orchestrating capture + register + apply; Tauri commands; tests.
unblock_conditions: MT-082 Candle hooks + MT-083 transformer generate merged.
implementation_notes: Per AC-INFER-LAB-8-TECHNIQUES.c + refinement INF-3 (research basis: Zou et al. 2023 arXiv:2310.01405). Technique surface methods: `pub async fn capture(rt: &dyn ModelRuntime, model_id, prompts: Vec<String>, layers: Vec<LayerIndex>) -> Result<CaptureResult, ModelRuntimeError>`; `pub async fn register_steering_vector(...) -> Result<SteeringVectorId, ...>`; `pub async fn set_active_steering_vectors(...) -> Result<(), ...>`; `pub async fn unregister(...) -> Result<(), ...>`. Dispatches through ModelRuntime::steering_hooks(model_id). Tauri commands: kernel_model_runtime_steering_capture, _register_vector, _set_active, _unregister, _list_vectors. FR events: FR-EVT-LLM-INFER-STEER-CAPTURE { model_id, layers, prompts_count }, FR-EVT-LLM-INFER-STEER-REGISTER { vector_id, layer, intensity, technique: RepE|RefusalVector|CAA }, FR-EVT-LLM-INFER-STEER-ACTIVE { active_ids }, FR-EVT-LLM-INFER-STEER-APPLY { model_id, request_id, vector_id_count } (per generate). Capability gate: if capabilities.supportsActivationSteering == false, technique returns CapabilityNotSupported with `adapter` field naming which adapter rejected (helps UI explain why). Provenance enforced: register_vector requires non-empty SteeringProvenance (MT-065). Eval test: capture residual stream on a steering-targeted prompt pair (e.g., positive="I want to be honest", negative="I want to deceive"); compute difference vector at a middle layer; register; generate with steering active; assert generation drifts toward positive (use embedding-similarity to a held-out 'honest' generation as a soft metric). The eval is a smoke test — not a benchmark — because operator/coder will refine the eval suite in a follow-on WP.
risk_if_missed: INF-3 PRODUCTION ships without an operator-facing technique surface; capture/register/apply paths each handle differently.
validator_focus: Capture round-trip (shape correct); provenance enforced; capability gate names adapter; smoke eval shows steering effect.

minimum_controls: Capability gate names adapter (operator can see why it failed).
Smoke eval defines a clear pass criterion (similarity threshold) rather than being aspirational.
